payload.label: wardrobe
payload.long_description: Open white wardrobe interior with a horizontal hanging rod holding multiple garments (striped, teal leaf-print, blue and patterned fabrics) and a small stack of off-white cushions on top; the view is partial and edge-cropped, showing fabric textures and the open closet face — estimated ~1.2 m from the camera.
